response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the minimum bar of 15+ years of software engineering experience and a technical bachelor's degree, with genuinely broad full-stack, embedded, and open-source depth. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms, and the ability to advise strategic customers and shape cloud product direction. The candidate's AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure at Naver since 2025), his career trajectory is senior/staff IC product engineering rather than engineering leadership or strategy, and there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field or evidence of industry-recognized AI thought leadership.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent practical experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
Entrepreneurial and open-source track record: founded and sustains a Geo-Data platform used by real organizations, plus multiple maintained libraries and conference talks
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale the role demands; AI experience is under two years and tooling-focused
Career has been senior/staff IC delivery work with no evidence of director-level scope, strategy setting, or advising executive customers
No master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and limited demonstrated cloud platform strategy beyond application-level AWS/Kubernetes use

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
15+ years broad engineering experience with recent agentic-AI tooling work
